description_long: This is a modern, rectangular cabinet or shelving unit integrated into a room divider, featuring a combination of open shelving and closed compartments. The structure is predominantly white, with a section of the wall adorned in vertical, multicolored stripes, adding a decorative accent. One side of the unit includes a large window panel, while the interior shelves display a few visible items such as books and small decor pieces. The cabinet is built into the wall, with a countertop or desk-like surface extending along one side, and a bench or low shelf beneath a large wall-mounted frame. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for use in a contemporary urban living space, office, or studio. The materials appear to be primarily wood or engineered wood, with some glass and metal elements.
description: A modern, built-in cabinet or shelving unit with white surfaces, multicolored striped accents, and integrated shelving and compartments. Features include a large window panel, open and closed storage, and a sleek, contemporary design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the plain white exterior and a glimpse of the striped accent wall and shelving inside.
description_view_1: View highlighting the large window panel, striped wall, and a door leading into the shelving area.
description_view_2: Rear view with a focus on the white wall, countertop, and a large wall-mounted frame above a bench or low shelf.
description_view_3: View showing the door, part of the striped wall, and the extended countertop or desk surface.
